message:
fix(command): fix LCS silent failure and optimize LEN mode space

The LCS command implementation silently returned an empty string if the DP table size exceeded 16M entries. This led to incorrect results for relatively small strings (e.g. 4KB). This commit:
- Returns a proper error for large inputs without the LEN flag instead of failing silently.
- Optimizes the LEN mode to use O(min(N,M)) space via a 2-row rolling array, allowing it to succeed on strings of any size up to the 512MB limit.
